advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the two main issues described with the target device ini generation process?
questions.justification: The synthesis text describes two main issues: 1) when switching devices, the TargetDevice button does not work, and 2) when placing the TargetDevice.ini file, the settings are applied, preventing the system from reading the information.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the TargetDeviceChecker class and the TargetDevice.ini file?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the TargetDeviceChecker class and the TargetDevice.ini file are used to compare the target device information and remove non-target devices from the list, ensuring that only the target device is operated on.

questions.question: What are the specific settings that can be configured in the TargetDevice.ini file?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides examples of the settings that can be configured in the TargetDevice.ini file, including ChipId, PortLocation, FwAvailable, PID, Manufacturer, Product, ToolVersion, MaskString, RunningString, and VendorString.
